resume_text: Statistics graduate with hands-on experience from two internships doing sales and marketing analytics. Built a customer churn dashboard in Tableau that became the primary tool for the retention team. Comfortable with SQL (joins, window functions, CTEs), Python (pandas, matplotlib), and Excel. Completed Google Data Analytics and Tableau Desktop Specialist certifications. Eager to work with large datasets and present findings clearly to non-technical audiences.

Marketing funnel report cycle reduced from 2 days to 20 minutes
ownership_signals: Owned churn dashboard design, data model, and stakeholder sign-off

resume_text: 2.5 years as a product analyst at a mid-sized SaaS company. Owns the product analytics stack including event tracking schema, funnel analysis, and A/B test evaluation. Designed and monitored 14 A/B tests, 9 of which informed product roadmap decisions. Reduced dashboard query costs by 35% via dbt model optimisation. Communicates insights weekly to the CPO. Comfortable in SQL, Python, and dbt. Working knowledge of statistical significance and experiment design.

Rebuilt event tracking schema supporting 3 new product lines
Optimised dbt models reducing dashboard query costs by 35%

Weekly executive dashboard reduced ad-hoc data requests by 60%
Cost savings from query optimisation valued at $18K/year
ownership_signals: Sole owner of product analytics stack — schema design, maintenance, and access governance
Defined A/B test policy and minimum detectable effect standards for the product team
Weekly presenting to CPO without manager mediation

Built an anomaly detection pipeline that flags revenue anomalies within 15 minutes of occurrence. Regularly presents to the board. Expert in SQL, Python, Spark, and Looker LookML.

resume_text: Chartered Accountant (CA) with 4 years in financial reporting who transitioned to data analytics 2 years ago. Deep familiarity with P&L, balance sheet analysis, and variance reporting translates directly to business KPI ownership. Self-taught SQL, Python, and Power BI. Delivered a financial forecasting model that replaced a 200-tab Excel workbook, cutting monthly close time from 5 days to 1 day. Bridges the gap between finance and data teams naturally.

Finance team eliminated 15 hours/month of manual reconciliation
ownership_signals: Sole designer and maintainer of forecasting model used by CFO

Published 2 peer-reviewed analytics papers. Holds certifications in clinical data management and health informatics. Presents at HIMSS annually. Known for translating complex clinical findings into board-ready narratives.
